modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help purchasing QuickBooks online version.

full_description_text: I have a version of QuickBooks that is not supported. I want to know how to buy the online version. Please help me with the steps to purchase it. I am not sure what to do next.
short_description: Need help purchasing QuickBooks online version.
description: I have a version of QuickBooks that is not supported. I want to know how to buy the online version. Please help me with the steps to purchase it. I am not sure what to do next.
